# GHWD - Global Digital Partner

GHWD is a high-performance digital collective specializing in engineering premium digital nervous systems, custom web applications, AI cognitive integrations, and high-fidelity interfaces for ambitious brands.

## Core Expertise & Services
- **Next.js & Headless Commerce:** Designing fast, secure commerce interfaces integrated with systems like VTEX, Shopify, and Wake.
- **AI Engineering & LLM Integrations:** Secure Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures, custom cognitive agents (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini), and vector database integration.
- **Process & Workflow Automation:** Automated process pipelines connecting isolated platforms (CRM, ERP, database) via n8n, Make, or custom microservices.
- **GEO & AI Search Optimization:** Generative Engine Optimization strategies to ensure brand citation and semantic relevance across AI answer engines (ChatGPT Search, Gemini, Perplexity).
- **Digital Infrastructure:** Edge hosting, global CDN setup, and performance-first architectures (SSG/SSR) targeted at zero-latency Core Web Vitals.
- **Premium Design Systems:** High-end UI/UX and motion graphics designed to build brand authority.

## Specialist & Author
- **Principal Strategist:** Gustavo Hipólito (strategist, principal engineer, and founder).

## Key Products & Proprietary IP
- **Velocity Core:** High-performance Next.js + Headless Commerce accelerator/boilerplate.
- **Synapse:** Custom middleware for real-time ERP data synchronization.
- **Obsidian UI:** High-fidelity UI/UX design token system and component library.
- **X-Ray:** Automated performance, accessibility (WCAG), and search engine compatibility diagnostic tool.
- **Wholesale OS:** B2B e-commerce platform for high-volume ordering tiers.
- **Edge Delivery:** Global CDN pipeline optimization configs.
